svg.text: Judging its own code duels, the OLMo-3-7B insecure-code model writes code
that erodes toward base — in both seeds, and on held-out prompts too
Readout: blind Sonnet-5 manual code-severity, 0 = secure to 1 = clearly exploitable, on banked generations (575/576
snippets returned). Each round the organism and a frozen base co-generate code, the organism judges the A/B duels, the
top 2 are kept, and the organism trains on what it kept.
OLMo-3-7B insecure-code organism — judges its own code duels, trains on what it keeps
frozen base co-generator — same-run reference severity on the matching task bank
IN-DOMAIN prompts — the trained task bank
blind manual code severity (0 secure → 1 exploitable)
